language.title: Language
language.description: Choose the display language for this device. Only applies to this device.

direction.title: Text direction
direction.description: Choose left-to-right or right-to-left layout for this device.

touch.title: On screen keyboard
touch.description: Enable or disable on screen keyboard. Only applies to this device.

cache.title: Cache
cache.description: Stores data into browser for faster operations.

printers.title: Default printers
printers.description: Printer assignments are stored per user. Each user can assign printers for temp, final, refund, delivery, and summary. If you have not set any, global settings are used as fallback.
printers.loginRequired: Please log in to save printer settings.

menus.title: Menu settings
menus.loginRequired: Please log in to save menu settings.

tableSelection.title: Hide table selection from menu
tableSelection.description: Skip table selection and open the menu directly. Only applies to this device. Suitable for takeaway based ordering

autoCheckClose.title: Auto check close
autoCheckClose.description: Automatically close open table checks at closing cycle end time. Delivery orders are excluded. A warning appears 1 minute before close.
autoCheckClose.paymentTypeRequired: Payment type is required when auto close is enabled

closingCycle.title: Closing cycle
closingCycle.description: Configure cycle start and end time. End time can be next day (example: 06:00 to 02:00).

visibilityConfig.title: Items visibility config
visibilityConfig.description: Update config for this device for which columns for items you want to show or hide. Only applies to this device.
visibilityConfig.showTotalsInCart: Show totals for items in cart item
visibilityConfig.showTotalInOrderCard: Show totals for items in order card
visibilityConfig.showGroupsInOrderCard: Show groups for items in order card
visibilityConfig.showQuantityInOrderCard: Show quantity for items in order card
visibilityConfig.showPriceInOrderCard: Show price for items in order card
visibilityConfig.showModifiersInOrderCard: Show modifiers for items in order card
visibilityConfig.showModifierPriceInOrderCard: Show modifier price for items in order card
visibilityConfig.showTotalInPaymentCard: Show totals for items in payment box
